name: Modiv Inc. 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Modiv Inc. 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred equity that pays a fixed dividend to its holders. This preferred stock has priority over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution in the event of liquidation. The "perpetual" aspect means there is no fixed maturity date, and the "redeemable" feature allows Modiv to repurchase the shares at a specific price.
